text: أُولٰئِکَ‌ جَزَاؤُهُمْ‌ أَنَ‌ عَلَيْهِمْ‌ لَعْنَةَ اللَّهِ‌ وَ الْمَلاَئِکَةِ وَ النَّاسِ‌ أَجْمَعِينَ‌

en.ahmedali: For such the requital is the curse of God and the angels and of men.
en.ahmedraza: The recompense of such is that on them is the curse of Allah and of the angels and of men combined.
en.arberry: Those -- their recompense is that there shall rest on them the curse of God and of the angels and of men, altogether,
en.daryabadi: These! their meed is that on them shall be the curse of Allah and of angles and of mankind, all;
en.hilali: They are those whose recompense is that on them (rests) the Curse of Allah, of the angels, and of all mankind.
en.itani: Those—their penalty is that upon them falls the curse of God, and of the angels, and of all mankind.
en.maududi: The recom- pense for their wrong-doing is that the curse of Allah and of the angels and of all men shall upon them.
en.mubarakpuri: They are those whose recompense is that on them (rests) the curse of Allah, of the angels and of all mankind.
en.pickthall: As for such, their guerdon is that on them rests the curse of Allah and of angels and of men combined.
en.qarai: Their requital is that there shall be upon them the curse of Allah, the angels, and all mankind.
en.qaribullah: Those, their recompense shall be the curse of Allah, the angels, and all the people
en.sahih: Those - their recompense will be that upon them is the curse of Allah and the angels and the people, all together,
en.sarwar: What they will gain will be the condemnation of God, the angels, and all people,
en.shakir: (As for) these, their reward is that upon them is the curse of Allah and the angels and of men, all together.
en.transliteration: Olaika jazaohum anna AAalayhim laAAnata Allahi waalmalaikati waalnnasi ajmaAAeena
en.wahiduddin: such people will be rewarded with rejection by God, by the angels, by all mankind.
en.yusufali: Of such the reward is that on them (rests) the curse of Allah, of His angels, and of all mankind;-
fa.ansarian: اینان کیفرشان این است که لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و همه مردم بر آنان است.
fa.ayati: جزايشان اين است كه لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و همه مردم بر آنان است.
fa.bahrampour: آنان سزايشان اين است كه لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و مردم، همگى بر آنهاست
fa.fooladvand: آنان، سزايشان اين است كه لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و مردم، همگى برايشان است.
fa.ghomshei: کیفر آن گروه کافر این است که خدا و فرشتگان و همه مردمان بر آنان لعنت کنند.
fa.khorramdel: این چنین کسانی، کیفرشان این است که لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و مردمان همه، بر آنان باشد. [[«جَزَآؤُهُمْ»: مبتدای دوم است.]]
fa.khorramshahi: جزای اینان آن است که لعنت الهی و لعنت فرشتگان و مردم همگی بر آنان است‌
fa.makarem: کیفر آنها، این است که لعن (و طرد) خداوند و فرشتگان و مردم همگی بر آنهاست.
fa.moezzi: آنان را پاداش آن است که بر ایشان است لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و مردم همگی‌
fa.mojtabavi: آنان سزايشان اين است كه لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و همه مردمان بر آنها باشد.
fa.sadeqi: ایشان، سزایشان این است که بی‌گمان لعنت خدا و فرشتگان و مردمان بر ایشان است.
